title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
